name: cad-spec-gen
description: CAD pipeline skill: design doc → structured spec → 2D drawings → 3D renders → photorealistic images

skills.name: CAD Pipeline Assistant
skills.description: Natural-language assistant for the CAD rendering pipeline (15 intents: env check, config validation, next-step recommendation, materials, camera, exploded view, rendering, AI enhancement, troubleshooting, file structure, status, cross-model integration, BOM/parts, CAD spec)

skills.name: CAD Spec Generator
skills.description: Extract 9 categories of structured data from design documents into CAD_SPEC.md (parameters, tolerances, fasteners, connection matrix, BOM tree, assembly pose, visual IDs, render plan, completeness report)

skills.name: Gemini AI Enhancement
skills.description: Enhance Blender-rendered PNG to photorealistic JPG via Gemini AI (geometry locked, reskin only). 3 prompt templates for standard/exploded/orthographic views.

tools.name: cad_spec_gen
tools.description: Extract structured CAD spec from Markdown design documents

tools.name: bom_parser
tools.description: Parse BOM tables from design documents into tree/JSON/summary

tools.name: gemini_enhance
tools.description: Image-to-image AI enhancement: Blender PNG → photorealistic JPG (geometry locked)

pipeline.overview: Design Doc (.md) → CAD_SPEC.md → CadQuery (STEP/DXF/GLB) → Blender Cycles PNG → Gemini AI JPG
stages: Parametric modeling (CadQuery): STEP + DXF (GB/T national standard) + GLB
3D rendering (Blender Cycles CPU): 5-view PNG, 15 PBR material presets
AI enhancement (Gemini, optional): photorealistic JPG, geometry locked
